sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ الْأَطِبَّاءَ فِي تَشْخِيصِ الْأَمْرَاضِ بِدِقَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija pomaže ljekarima u preciznom dijagnosticiranju bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence helps doctors diagnose diseases accurately.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَطِيعُ الْحَوَاسِيبُ تَحْلِيلَ كَمِّيَّاتٍ كَبِيرَةٍ مِنَ الْبَيَانَاتِ بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Računari mogu brzo analizirati velike količine podataka.
sentences.translationEn: Computers can analyze large amounts of data quickly.

sentences.arabic: تُغَيِّرُ هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةُ طَرِيقَةَ عَيْشِنَا وَعَمَلِنَا فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Ova tehnologija mijenja način na koji živimo i radimo u budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: This technology is changing the way we live and work in the future.
